propositions: Structured INFO _emit events from the review-bot are silently dropped in production, leaving operators blind to bot decisions.
No logging setup exists for rebar.* loggers, so INFO records fall through to Python's lastResort which only emits WARNING and above.
A _configure_logging() should attach a StreamHandler(sys.stdout) to the rebar logger at INFO level, called once at module import.
The log handler must be idempotent so repeated imports or reloads do not stack duplicate handlers, and propagate=False avoids double-logging through uvicorn/root.
The log level should be overridable via REVIEW_BOT_LOG_LEVEL, defaulting to INFO when absent or invalid.
Centralizing logs to a shared service like CloudWatch is out of scope and tracked separately.
